overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character navigating a rain-slicked neon-lit commercial district at night. The sequence transitions from walking through crowded streets to high-speed vehicle traversal, ending with a pedestrian crossing of a major intersection dominated by holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with crosswalks and storefronts

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives past on the left side of the street
pedestrians cross the yellow-striped crosswalk in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cyberpunk street, observing neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: large red rectangular sign with white text mounted above the street entrance
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and vertical neon accents
multiple holographic advertisements displaying commercial products on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk commercial street at night, dominated by the red 'Pondsmith' sign overhead. The camera walks forward through the intersection as a futuristic vehicle passes on the left, and pedestrians cross the yellow-striped crosswalk. Towering glass skyscrapers with neon accents rise in the background, their reflections shimmering on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street during high-speed vehicle traversal

events.description: camera accelerates rapidly from walking speed to high-speed vehicle traversal
rapid traversal through multiple city blocks with heavy motion blur

agents.ego_description: speeding through neon-lit streets in a vehicle, navigating past blurred building facades

entered.detail: yellow double lines and crosswalk markings blurring rapidly beneath the vehicle

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts abruptly to high-speed vehicle traversal, with the camera racing through the city streets at velocity. The neon-lit environment blurs into streaks of color as the vehicle navigates the wet roads, leaving the Pondsmith sign and initial street behind in a rapid motion sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with circular central advertising structure

events.description: vehicle slows down approaching the large intersection with circular building
comes to a complete stop at the crosswalk waiting for traffic signal

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at the intersection, observing the rotating holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: person standing at the street corner waiting to cross the intersection

entered.detail: large cylindrical structure covered in massive rotating holographic advertisements
pink neon sign with white text reading 'wide open' on the right building facade
pink neon hotel sign with Japanese characters visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates as it approaches a massive urban intersection dominated by a cylindrical building wrapped in holographic advertisements. The camera comes to a stop at the crosswalk, revealing the 'Wide Open' neon sign on the right and a distant hotel sign on the left. A pedestrian waits at the corner while the wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with holographic advertising towers

events.description: begins crossing the wide intersection at the yellow-striped crosswalk
approaching the hotel entrance on the left side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection toward the hotel district, navigating between other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to pass

entered.detail: ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated entrances and signage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the vehicle and begins crossing the expansive intersection, moving toward the pink neon Hotel sign on the left. The circular holographic building rotates its advertisements overhead while other pedestrians cross in the same direction. A white futuristic car waits patiently at the crosswalk as the camera approaches the street-level shop entrances on the left side of the wide avenue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, transitioning from a slow pedestrian pace to high-speed traversal before settling back into a wide urban crossing. It begins by walking through a neon-lit intersection under a red Pondsmith sign, where futuristic vehicles and pedestrians move across wet, shimmering asphalt. The perspective then shifts abruptly into a high-velocity blur of color as a vehicle races through the city streets, leaving the initial commercial block behind. As the vehicle decelerates, the scene opens up to a massive intersection dominated by a rotating cylindrical building wrapped in holographic advertisements and a glowing Wide Open sign. Finally, the camera exits the vehicle to cross the expansive avenue toward a pink hotel sign, moving past waiting futuristic cars and street-level shops under the rotating glow of the holograms.
